theme_and_archetype.archetype: Archetype 5: Jewel & Luxury (Premium Moody Fast Food Adaptation)
theme_and_archetype.description: A cinematic, dark, and highly appetizing aesthetic that makes vibrant food colors pop against deep black and rich orange/gold accents. This approach emphasizes quality, heat, and bold flavors.

scale.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-anton uppercase tracking-tight leading-none

rules: Headings must use Anton in uppercase for a punchy, street-food-meets-premium vibe.
Body text must use Outfit for maximum legibility on dark backgrounds.
Never use Inter, Roboto, or Poppins.

surface_treatment.cards: bg-[#1A1A1A] border border-[#2A2A2A] rounded-xl overflow-hidden hover:border-[#FF6B35]/50 transition-colors duration-300

buttons.primary: bg-[#FF6B35] text-[#F5F5F0] hover:bg-[#E85D2A] rounded-md px-6 py-3 font-outfit font-bold transition-all active:scale-95 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(255,107,53,0.3)]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#FFD700] text-[#FFD700] hover:bg-[#FFD700]/10 rounded-md px-6 py-3 font-outfit font-bold transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.pill_filter: rounded-full px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium border border-[#2A2A2A] hover:border-[#FF6B35] data-[state=active]:bg-[#FF6B35] data-[state=active]:text-white transition-all

menu_card.structure: Image top (h-48 object-cover), Body padding p-5. Flex-col layout.
menu_card.title: text-xl font-anton uppercase
menu_card.variant_select: For items with Half/Full options, use a compact toggle or Shadcn Select before the Add to Cart button.

header.style: sticky top-0 z-50 bg-[#0D0D0D]/90 backdrop-blur-lg border-b border-[#2A2A2A]

cart_drawer.item: flex items-center gap-4 py-4 border-b border-[#2A2A2A]/50

motion_and_interactions.scroll: Smooth scrolling via Lenis (or similar CSS scroll-behavior: smooth)
motion_and_interactions.reveal: Fade-up on scroll for menu items and section headers using framer-motion (y: 20, opacity: 0 -> y: 0, opacity: 1)
motion_and_interactions.hover: Image scale-up on card hover (105%), subtle border color shift to #FF6B35
motion_and_interactions.micro_interactions: Cart icon pulse when item added, numeric badge pop animation

testing.attributes: ALL interactive elements MUST include data-testid. Examples: data-testid='add-to-cart-button', data-testid='menu-filter-momos', data-testid='checkout-submit', data-testid='cart-drawer-trigger'.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure the application strictly follows the color palette provided. No pure whites for backgrounds; stick to #0D0D0D and #1A1A1A.
Implement a clean, modern sticky navbar with the cart icon indicating live count. Use glassmorphism carefully over the dark background.
For the Menu Section, construct a robust Tab/Filter component. The filters are: All | Potatoes | Rolls | Momos | Chowmein | Rice | Main Course | Chopsy.

Menu Data Structure MUST support variant pricing (Half/Full) for specific items like Chowmein or Rice. Display these clearly on the UI before adding to cart (e.g., 'Half: ₹50 / Full: ₹60' radio toggle or select dropdown).
Integrate Shadcn UI elements but customize their borders, radii, and bg colors to match the #1A1A1A cards and #FF6B35 active states.
In the About Section, implement a striking 5.0 Star badge (#FFD700) and layout the story beside it.
Order Info Section must embed a Google Map iFrame pointing to Ghaziabad.
Set up standard Stripe checkout form for INR in the cart drawer / checkout page flow.
Create a basic Admin panel route (e.g., /admin) to manage menu items and view orders. Use a dense grid/table layout for the admin.
Use Lucide-React or Phosphor Icons for the UI.
All components must be .js files, not .tsx. Use prop-types if necessary instead of TS types.
